REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (527 Oak Park Drive S.F.)
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Schwarz for and with Alec Obst.

The sale was confirmed at $900,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Helen Yune-Trowbridge. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Leonardini. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (527 Oak Park Drive, San Francisco, Ca 94131)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (527 Oak Park Drive, San Francisco, Ca 94131)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Continued To Jul-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Schwarz for and with Alec Obst.

The Court stated that the signature on the will and the document do not appear to be the same. The Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed was continued to July 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a further declaration from any of the three Siblings or anyone else to support/prove that this is the Decedent's handwriting. Said declaration is due by June 28, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mann.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Continued To Jun-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
